title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 11 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 11 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 11 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/02/2026
Today, the DCE iron ore market traded with a weak, volatile bias. The benchmark contract, I2605, ultimately closed at762.5 RMB/tonne, representing a marginal decline of 0.07% from the previous trading session. Conversely, spot prices in the physical market rose slightly by approximately 4 RMB/tonne.
